title: Dividing whole numbers by unit fractions visually
description: Learn how to divide whole number by unit fractions with visual models.
topic_path: Dividing whole numbers by unit fractions
Dividing whole numbers by unit fractions visually

assessment_items.question_content:
**If $3$ wholes are divided into pieces that are each $\dfrac16$ of a whole, how many pieces are there?**


$3\div\dfrac16 =$  [[☃ numeric-input 1]]



[[☃ image 1]]



[[☃ image 2]]



[[☃ image 3]]
hints: To solve $3\div\dfrac16$, we can divide $3$ into $\dfrac16$ pieces and count the number of pieces.

[[☃ image 1]]



[[☃ image 2]]



[[☃ image 3]]

There are $18$ pieces.

options.alt: Three circles. The first circle is divided into six equal-sized parts with all parts shaded.
The second circle is divided into six equal-sized parts with all parts shaded.
The third circle is divided into six equal-sized parts with all parts shaded.
